text: The "off-load" release system on a survival craft is designed to be activated

options.text: A) when there is no load on the cable
B) when there is a load on the cable
C) only when the doors are closed
D) when the engine is started

explanation: An off-load release system is a safety feature that prevents the release of the liferaft or lifeboat from the davit until the full weight of the craft is supported by the water, preventing accidental premature release while suspended.
